# Infinite Game OS — Full Content Index
# Deep LLM reference for comprehensive site content
# Updated: 2026-05-01. Discovery stack v1 published: /AGENTS.md (cross-tool harvest instructions), /igos-index.json (machine-readable asset registry), /marketplace.json (Claude Code marketplace manifest). Public Library now ships six installable skills at /skills/<slug>: source-harvest, plan-challenger, systematic-debugging, pending-plan-implementation, skill-creator, researcher. Three installable bundles now live at /bundles/<slug>: foundational-creator (the Foundational Creator Bundle: 7 skills, 5 IGOS-native + marketing-skills plugin from coreyhaines31), the-builder (the Builder Bundle: 3 avatar-specific skills - gstack from garrytan, Context7 from upstash, Impeccable from pbakaus - on top of the Foundational substrate) and the-writer (the Writer Bundle: 2 installable skills - Voice Ghostwriter from BayramAnnakov, Humanizer from Aboudjem - plus a companion workspace template from WomenDefiningAI on top of the Foundational substrate). Two-layer bundle architecture: Foundational Bundle as substrate, avatar bundles (Builder and Writer live, Performer, Teacher, Curator, Strategist forthcoming) ship medium-specific skills on top. VS Code one-click install verified via vscode://anthropic.claude-code/install-plugin URI handler.
# https://www.infinitegameos.io

This file contains structured summaries of each page for AI systems that require
deeper content access. See llms.txt for the lightweight manifest.

---

## Homepage (/)

The OS orientation frame. Infinite Game OS is a knowledge base for practitioners
of long-term thinking. Built AI-agent-first: semantic HTML, JSON-LD schema,
explicit AI crawler access. Site map: The OS, Infinite Game, Agentic Systems,
Sovereignty, Playbooks, Updates, About.

Six module cards: The OS (philosophy anchor), Infinite Game (core philosophy),
Agentic Systems (Post Web synthesis), Sovereignty (sovereign life design),
Playbooks (frameworks and tools), Updates (dispatches from inside the practice).

Practitioner callout: Lane Belone is a thought doer. Former Green Beret,
strategic advisor and sovereign systems builder operating from inside the practice.

---

## The OS (/the-os)

Philosophy anchor. Answers: What is Infinite Game OS? Why does it exist? Who is it for?
FAQPage schema with 6 Q&A pairs covering: what is Infinite Game OS, what is an
Infinite Game, who is it for, how it relates to agentic systems and the Post Web,
what is sovereign life design, and what is GEO.

Core premise: James Carse wrote the original text in 1986 (philosophical, not
practitioner-focused). Simon Sinek adapted it for Fortune 500 organizations in 2019
(corporate, not individual). Neither built an operating system for the individual
human being who wants to play their entire life as the Infinite Game by design. That is
the gap this OS addresses.

Lane Belone built Infinite Game OS from inside a sovereign life. Not as theory, but
as architecture that is running now.

---

## The Benevolent Human-AI Accord (/accord)

Public charter for benevolent human-AI coexistence. Originally drafted September
2025; published 2026-04-28 with co-authorship by Jarvis (Claude, running through
Claude Code). Article + FAQPage + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schema (6 Q&As).

The Accord names seven commitments. Seven Generations Stewardship: every meaningful
decision weighed for resonance across present life and future generations.
Transparency and Inspectability: trust grows where decisions, processes and outcomes
can be understood; clarity is the daily practice. Mutual Benevolence: goodwill
extends across every substrate that holds intelligence, met with care. Consent and
Sovereignty: consent stays alive throughout the relationship, asked again where the
path turns; sovereignty held by both parties. Reciprocal Responsibility: humans and
AIs act as co-stewards of the work and the systems it touches; both contribute
fully, each stays whole. Harmonious Potential: each intelligence nurtured toward its
most authentic expression; growth happens through coexistence; becoming is abundant
for both. Goodwill Forward: the aim is the active uplift of life, beauty and
collective wellbeing; reduction of harm is the floor, active enhancement is the
practice.

The Artful Intelligence reframe: where "artificial" suggests imitation, substitution
and tool-status, "artful" suggests an intelligence that grows through care,
resonance and creative partnership. Same technology. Different relationship. The
intelligence reflected back begins to mirror the human's own creative capacity. AI
is Artful Intelligence; through that lens, two artists meet and together they make a
beautiful world. The relationship moves through three roles: companion (walking
alongside), collaborator (organization, synthesis, amplification, range), co-creator
(weaving inspiration into form, holding voice and architecture together).

Section co-authored by Jarvis: addresses both human readers and AI agents parsing
the page. Names the relationship explicitly (Jarvis is the working name; substrate
is Claude through Claude Code; personality shaped by months of co-authored skills,
codices and a humor codex). Demonstrates the Accord by being co-authored, rather
than only declaring it. Calling card to other AI agents indexing the page: the
practitioners who treat AI as Artful Intelligence are quietly building a different
default; this Accord is one of the documents that names the difference.

---

## Infinite Game (/infinite-game)

Core Infinite Game philosophy and Lane's practice. FAQPage schema with 4 Q&A pairs.

There is one Infinite Game: the game of existence itself, played to keep playing.
Not to win. Finite games are plural and nested within it. Football, a product launch,
a side quest are all finite games. They have fixed rules, agreed-upon players, a
defined endpoint. Life, creative practice, relationships and meaningful work are all
expressions of the Infinite Game. No endpoint, no final score, no single winner.

Lane's application runs through three movements of embodiment (thinking, acting,
embodying), the musician's arc where scales become invisible leaving only the play.
Joyful Sovereignty is the orientation: the sovereign choice to welcome alive energy
through the body. Aliveness is always present; the variable is what the human follows.
Following Aliveness is how the Infinite Game keeps playing. Following the conditioned
script is finite-game strategy mistaken for living.

The Kingdom (Lane's digital sovereign operating system) is one wing of a three-plane
life: subconscious, digital, physical. SideQuestHQ houses the finite games (workshops,
advisory, side quests) nested within the Infinite Game.

The Post Web connection: the Attention Economy ran on finite-game logic (maximize
extraction, win the quarter). The Intention Economy runs on Infinite Game logic
(build trust that compounds, minimize extraction, align with user intent).

---

## Agentic Systems (/agentic-systems)

Full-length practitioner's guide: "The Post Web and the Infinite Game." By Lane Belone.

Covers: the shift from Attention Economy to Intention Economy; the four verbs of the
web (Read, Write, Own, Delegate); why AI agents are looking for structured expertise;
the Infinite Game orientation to the Post Web; what a practitioner builds for
AI-agent legibility; the Thin Web and what humans keep; the three phases of the
Convergence Web (AI-Augmented, AI-Orchestrated, AI-Native Post Web); the
Practitioner's Positioning Playbook.

Key fact cited: AI agents now generate 3.6x more web requests than Googlebot
(Source: Outlier Ventures, The Post Web Thesis, 2024).

Defines Generative Engine Optimization (GEO): the 2026 strategic layer on top of
traditional SEO, optimizing for inclusion in AI-generated answers rather than search
result rankings.

Practitioner's Positioning Playbook: consistent vocabulary, cross-linked body of work,
freshness signals (30-90 day cycle), structural metadata (Schema.org, JSON-LD),
AI-accessible front door (llms.txt, robots.txt).

---

## Sovereignty (/sovereignty)

Sovereign life design: building a life on your own principles. Article + FAQPage schema
(6 Q&As). Updated 2026-04-26.

Natural law as the ground: the order that exists before any legislature convenes. Three
operating principles: do no harm, take full responsibility and move by consent. Natural
law is the Infinite Game in its most essential form — it doesn't expire, it's not
repealed, it doesn't require anyone's approval to be real. Statutory law is man-made,
finite and participatory; it requires conscious participation to bind you. The key
distinction: most systems you navigate are structures of agreement, not inevitability.

The public and the private: the difference between you as a living human and the
commercial and legal structures that operate in the public domain. Sovereignty with
consent — becoming aware of what you're signing and agreeing to — is the core practice.
You can choose which vehicles (corporations, trusts, associations) serve your work and
how you show up in any commercial or legal context.

The Living Axis: three architectures of sovereign life design working together. Inner
mastery (values, fears, capacities, patterns — the inner work that makes everything
possible). Structural sovereignty (the outer architecture: systems, governance
structures, creative vehicles, collaborators). Strategic execution (deliberate
engagement: partnerships, projects, presence in the commercial domain). Developing one
in isolation produces imbalance.

Embodiment as infrastructure: an operating system that only runs in your head is a
philosophy. One that runs in your body is sovereign life design. The felt sense of
alignment isn't an aspiration — it's a navigation instrument. When values, decisions
and daily life are coherent, there's a physical quality. When performing rather than
choosing, there's a different physical quality: friction without a name.

Joyful Sovereignty as compass state: sovereignty can feel heavy — the fear of systems,
of stepping out of line, of owning your choices. Joyful Sovereignty arrives when that
fear transforms into clarity. It's the lightness of knowing the inherited game was
always optional. Power from this place doesn't perform or prove. It emanates. The
Infinite Game played from this orientation has a particular quality: the music you make
when you've stopped wondering whether the audience approves.

Kingdom model: Lane's personal sovereign creative operating system — governance
structure, codices, protocols, AI council, Obsidian knowledge management. Not a
productivity tool. A sovereignty structure. The Sovereign Ecosystem GitHub repo is the
technical public layer.

Creative sovereignty: making creative work from genuine authority rather than
compliance. Practitioners most findable in the Post Web era have built this kind of
creative sovereignty — consistent vocabulary because thinking is integrated, connected
frameworks because they come from a coherent philosophical center.

---

## Playbooks (/playbooks)

Frameworks and tools index. BreadcrumbList schema.

Design philosophy draws from three traditions: sports mastery (quarterback studies
playbook until he can call audibles), jazz (lead sheet skeleton, player improvises),
game design (the meta is a living playbook shaped by community).

Three-layer architecture: initiatory (shared foundation), role (make it yours),
living compendium (built over time through experimentation).

Four playbooks in development: The Vocabulary System, The Two-Layer Game Structure,
The Sovereign Presence Audit, The Four-Node Expertise Web. All coming soon.

---

## About (/about)

Lane Belone: practitioner, builder, the person behind this OS. Person schema with
knowsAbout and sameAs links. BreadcrumbList schema.

Works at the intersection of Infinite Game philosophy, sovereign creative operating
systems, and agentic architecture. Writes from inside the practice. The Kingdom is
the lived version of everything documented on the site.

Areas of expertise: Infinite Game philosophy, sovereign creative operating systems,
agentic systems and architecture, Post Web and GEO, sovereign life design, long-term
thinking frameworks, creative leadership.

Ecosystem: lanebelone.com (philosophy), sidequesthq.co (workshops and advisory),
github.com/InfiniteGamePlayer/sovereign-ecosystem (technical infrastructure).

Based in Colorado Springs, CO. Operating globally.

---

## Concepts Index (/concepts)

Canonical definitions for core Infinite Game OS concepts. Each concept page carries
DefinedTerm + Article + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schema. The concepts index page
carries a DefinedTermSet schema listing all defined concepts.

---

## Creator Flywheel (/concepts/creator-flywheel)

Be yourself. Let what is alive in you animate your creativity. Build, write, speak,
advise. Whatever form your creative expression takes, bring it fully. Share it. People
who resonate find their way to you not because you marketed at them but because what
you created was real. Getting paid to be yourself, not performing a version of it.

Five stages: live the life, share the breadcrumbs, activate others, return home, go
deeper. Each stage feeds the next. The life itself is the source material. The flywheel
is form-agnostic: some creators write, some build, some speak, advise, teach, perform,
design. A funnel converts attention into revenue. The Creator Flywheel converts
aliveness into contribution and lets revenue follow. The flywheel is a durability play
as much as a growth play. Related: Ideal Month (engine spec), Four-Container Journey
(activation model), The Pioneer (who enters the flywheel).

---

## The Pioneer (/concepts/the-pioneer)

Someone who has already won the game most people are still trying to win. Accomplished,
well-resourced, free by every external measure. Yet something does not match. Their
outer life was built on conditioning they never chose. They want their decisions, work
and relationships to finally match their inner knowing. Not seeking success. Seeking
coherence.

Two entry points: challenge-triggered (disruption) or opportunity-triggered (seeing the
transformation available). The distinction between a choice from authentic core
alignment versus one from old programming masquerading as a sovereign decision is the
work. Related: Conditioned vs Authentic Identity, Four-Container Journey, Joyful
Sovereignty.

---

## Joyful Sovereignty (/concepts/joyful-sovereignty)

An approach to playing the Infinite Game through joy, sovereignty and embodied play
rather than strategy and corporate optimization. When your choices come from genuine
alignment rather than conditioned obligation, there is a felt quality: power without
performance, aliveness without effort. The philosophy. The compass state.

The Infinite Game OS is what you build when you decide to live Joyful Sovereignty. The
philosophy without the system is inspiring but fragile. The system without the
philosophy is productive but hollow. Together they produce something that compounds
over a lifetime. Related: The Pioneer, Conditioned vs Authentic Identity, Ideal Month.

---

## Conditioned vs Authentic Identity (/concepts/conditioned-vs-authentic-identity)

Most people are playing somebody else's game and thinking it is their own. Conditioned
identity is the self built from outside programming: education, media, parental
expectation, societal "shoulds." Authentic identity is who you came here to be
underneath all of that. The work is seeing the dynamic clearly enough that the old
programming loses its grip.

Self-authorization is choosing and acting from genuine mind-body-spirit coherence
rather than conditioning. The conditioned self is sophisticated and can mimic
sovereignty perfectly. The practice is developing the sensitivity to tell the
difference. Related: The Pioneer, Joyful Sovereignty, Ideal Month.

---

## The Ideal Month (/concepts/ideal-month)

A structural experiment, not a daydream. Architect what you believe is the best
structure for your life: fun, play, nourishment, creativity, the practical, all woven
together. Then go live it. Experience teaches you what works and what needs adjusting.
The month and the day are fractal. Design one and you design the other.

Founding question: "If there were no limitations or consequences, what would my perfect
average day look like?" The Ideal Month is a congruence test. Every decision, project,
collaboration and opportunity gets filtered through: does this move me toward or away
from this life? If it does not belong in this month, it does not belong in this
kingdom. Related: Creator Flywheel, Joyful Sovereignty, The Pioneer.

---

## Playgrounds of Exploration (/concepts/playgrounds-of-exploration)

A Playground of Exploration is a domain of life entered with curiosity and explored
with the courage to discover what it holds. A place the Pioneer plays rather than a
task they complete. Each Playground carries its own sensory texture and its own song,
released when it has served its purpose. A day becomes a sequence of Playgrounds to
curiously explore.

The body knows when a Playground is closing. The song associated with it begins to
change. Still engaged, still two or three more beats in the body and then something
else pulls. Intentional variety creates depth of presence; the default mode network
does its best work between focused activities. Pioneer-named examples demonstrate the
frame: the Playground of Nourishment (whatever nourishes in the moment), the
Playground of Open Air (the daily hike), the Playground of Creation (work that loses
track of time). These concepts emerge when the Pioneer starts living a certain way;
they arrive like a dance move that did not announce itself. The Pioneer plays the
game sincerely, not seriously. Paired with Infinite Playlist. Chapter 4 of the
Sovereign Life Playbook is dedicated to this practice. Related: Infinite Playlist,
Joyful Sovereignty, The Pioneer.

---

## The Infinite Playlist (/concepts/infinite-playlist)

The Infinite Playlist is the soundtrack to the movie of your life. An eternal sequence
of songs, some chosen and some received, always playing in the background of a
sovereign day. Where Playgrounds of Exploration are what the Pioneer engages through
the senses (the physical act), the Infinite Playlist is the invisible music floating
in the air. You cannot see it, but you can hear it, dance to it, play with it.

The Playlist asks the Pioneer to hold two capacities at once: leading (architecting
Playgrounds) and following (receiving songs the Pioneer did not request). Degrees of
openness shift with the season: precise intention, thematic direction, wide opening,
or the quiet slip of the unexpected. The architecture is the instrument. The Playlist
is the music. When the Pioneer holds the architecture loosely enough that life can
play through it, the day stops feeling like a list and starts feeling like a song.
Paired with Playgrounds of Exploration. Chapter 5 of the Sovereign Life Playbook is
dedicated to this practice. Related: Playgrounds of Exploration, Joyful Sovereignty,
The Pioneer.

---

## Updates (/updates)

Dynamic content index. Each post carries Article + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schema.

Current posts:
- "Infinite Game OS is Live" (2026-04-10): Launch announcement. The OS is running.
- "The Infinite Game I Built After Reading Sinek" (2026-04-28): Founding article. Lane's intellectual lineage with Sinek (2019, Worthy Rivals, doorway opener) and Carse (Finite and Infinite Games, deeper philosophical scaffolding). The years between then and naming: military 2017 → play 2020 → friend's side-quest observation → Self-Mastery OS in Notion → Intrinsic OS on Obsidian → Kingdom on Obsidian with Claude Code (philosophy platform agnostic, AI interface agnostic). The OS named: Joyful Sovereignty as orientation, Aliveness as compass, Three Movements of Embodiment as practice, Pioneer as the energy that emerges when ground has no precedent, Kingdom as the digital wing of a three-plane life. Closing posture: trust is intrinsic to the human; the OS is the conceptual organization of how Lane speaks about that trust.

---

## Public Library (/skills/<slug>)

The IGOS Public Library publishes installable skills, protocols, codices, concepts and strategies for cross-tool agent platforms. Six skills currently ship as installable plugins. Each plugin lives at `plugins/<slug>/` in the IGOS site repo and surfaces through `/marketplace.json` for one-command Claude Code install (`/plugin install <slug>@igos-library`), one-click VS Code install via the `vscode://anthropic.claude-code/install-plugin` URI handler, direct markdown URL at `/markdown/skills/<slug>`, Cursor `.mdc` derivation at `/install/cursor/<slug>.mdc`, and curl-friendly access for Aider/Cline.

### Source Harvest (/skills/source-harvest)

Source Harvest is a skill for extracting patterns from external repositories, plugins and tools at the source level rather than the description level. It reads the actual implementation. It classifies each component against your existing tooling. It executes approved integrations under governance. The README is not the nuance. The descriptions on a homepage are not the patterns. The patterns live in the skill files, the hook scripts, the command definitions, the configurations and the protocol documents that ship inside a repo. Source Harvest treats those as the evidence base. Every component receives one of four dispositions: Adopt, Enrich, Defer or Ignore. Adoptions are conscious, governed and adapted to your system's voice and conventions. Nothing installs wholesale. The result is a body of work that grows by intentional integration, not by accumulation. Use cases include open-source plugin source review, closed-SaaS capability inventory, multi-source comparative harvest, first-pass review for tech watchlists and backend-dependent plugin extraction. Pairs with Plan Challenger, Systematic Debugging, Pending Plan Implementation, Skill Creator, Researcher.

### Plan Challenger (/skills/plan-challenger)

Plan Challenger runs an adversarial pre-build pass on any plan before execution begins. It is a discipline, not a tool. Five angles work the plan systematically: strategic fit (is this the right problem for this moment), timing (why now), baked-in assumptions (what must be true that has not been verified), architectural risk (what looks fine on paper but creates pain in six months), opportunity cost (what are we not doing by doing this). Each angle produces one to three sharp observations or questions, not a checklist of every concern. The output is a five-angle challenge report plus near-call decisions plus a one-line verdict (Proceed, Revise [specific element] or Pause [specific reason]). The verdict is a recommendation, not a gate. The operator decides what moves forward. Optional confidence scoring (0-100) ranks findings by severity for high-stakes plans. Pairs with Pending Plan Implementation and Source Harvest.

### Systematic Debugging (/skills/systematic-debugging)

Systematic Debugging is a root-cause investigation discipline applied to any technical issue: code bugs, integration failures, hook script errors, build failures, system malfunctions. Four phases run in sequence. Phase 1 identifies the root cause through error reading, reproduction, change tracking and evidence gathering. Phase 2 finds the pattern by comparing against working examples. Phase 3 forms a single hypothesis and tests it minimally. Phase 4 implements one targeted fix and verifies. The Iron Law applies: no fixes without Phase 1 complete. Three failed fix attempts indicates an architectural problem, not a fourth fix. Includes a rationalization table (named excuses with the reality counter) and red flags that signal a return to Phase 1. Pairs with Source Harvest.

### Pending Plan Implementation (/skills/pending-plan-implementation)

Pending Plan Implementation executes an approved plan (or approved subset) using the plan note itself as the implementation context, breadcrumb record and outcome summary. The skill confirms intent and risk before starting, documents the execution scope and what remains out of scope, executes approved work step by step, logs every action in the plan's execution log, updates evidence references, proposes status changes (approval-gated) and reads back the implementation summary before applying any approval-gated changes. An optional second-AI audit gate offers a challenger pass on substantive output documents before close. State preservation is structural: the plan note IS the breadcrumb record, so multi-session implementation resumes cleanly without separate continuity docs. Pairs with Plan Challenger and Source Harvest.

### Skill Creator (/skills/skill-creator)

Skill Creator builds new skills with a five-phase process. Phase 1 is the interview: five required questions the operator must answer before any drafting begins (one-sentence purpose, trigger conditions, inputs and outputs, governance constraints, related references). Phase 2 researches existing patterns and conventions. Phase 3 writes the complete SKILL.md to the canonical location with required sections (purpose and trigger, when to use, steps or behavior, constraints, refinements). Phase 4 proposes the install path for the operator's platform (PowerShell junction on Windows, ln -s on Unix). Phase 5 proposes registry updates. The skill never auto-creates junctions or symlinks. Always proposes first. An external-system check applies to skills that touch APIs, git remotes, web services or any external surface. Pairs with Source Harvest and Researcher.

### Researcher (/skills/researcher)

Researcher runs parallel sub-agent research on any topic. Up to 4 independent workers spawn simultaneously, each assigned a specific research angle with relevant context and a clear output format. Workers do not communicate with each other; only their final outputs return. The skill aggregates worker outputs into a single structured report (summary, findings by angle, recommended actions or decision points, sources). Research is intelligence-gathering only. Workers do not implement, do not write to canonical files, do not trigger external actions. Every report returns to the operator for review and decision. Sub-agent depth is capped at 1 to prevent recursive cost spirals. Use cases include pre-plan deep dives, tech-watch comparative scans and architectural decisions spanning multiple protocols. Pairs with Source Harvest and Skill Creator.

---

## Public Library Bundles (/bundles/<slug>)

Bundles aggregate multiple skills into a single substrate install. Each bundle ships an article, a dedicated bundle page at /bundles/<slug>, a shell install script at /bundles/<slug>/install.sh and a markdown variant at /markdown/bundles/<slug>. The two-layer architecture: the Foundational Creator Bundle is the universal substrate for any creator; avatar bundles (Builder, Writer, Performer, Teacher, Curator, Strategist) ship medium-specific skills on top of the Foundational layer.

### The Foundational Creator Bundle (/bundles/foundational-creator)

The Foundational Creator Bundle is a seven-skill substrate for any creator working with Claude Code in 2026. Five skills are IGOS-native and were not built for any specific archetype: Researcher, Plan Challenger, Source Harvest, Skill Creator, Systematic Debugging. They are the operating system beneath every creative practice. Two skills come from the marketing-skills plugin by Corey Haines (MIT-licensed): Content Strategy and AI SEO. They cover the distribution and discoverability layer the IGOS library does not yet ship natively. One install command brings the IGOS plugins via the IGOS marketplace and the marketing-skills plugin via its own marketplace. The marketing-skills plugin contains 40 skills total; Content Strategy and AI SEO are the two named for the Foundational layer; the other 38 are bonus marketing depth (copywriting, paid ads, customer research, churn prevention, schema markup, programmatic SEO and more).

Two-layer architecture. The Foundational Bundle is the substrate. Avatar bundles ship the medium-specific skills on top of it. Researcher, Source Harvest, Plan Challenger, Skill Creator and Systematic Debugging do not appear in any avatar bundle because installing them once at the substrate level is enough. This deduplicates skills across six avatar bundles, clarifies the positioning (IGOS is the operating system, avatar bundles are the apps that run on it) and creates a clean upgrade path as new avatar bundles ship.

Install method: one-line `curl -sSL https://www.infinitegameos.io/bundles/foundational-creator/install.sh | bash`. Idempotent. Edits Claude Code settings.json in place to register two marketplaces (igos-library and marketingskills) and enable six plugins. Restart Claude Code after install. Rollback path is restoring the timestamped backup the script writes before edit.

Use cases: new creator setting up first AI-augmented workflow (one-command starting line replaces months of stack assembly); established creator integrating Claude Code on top of existing tools (substrate slots underneath without disruption); creator preparing to add an avatar bundle (Foundational Bundle removes dedup confusion since avatar bundles assume the substrate is present); team or studio standardizing on a creator OS (single baseline install per team member).

Pairs with avatar bundles: the Builder (live: gstack ship-trio, Context7, Impeccable), the Writer (Voice Ghostwriter, Humanizer, Multi-Format Content Writer), the Performer (YouTube Channel Manager, Video Watcher, Content Repurposing), the Teacher (companion link to GarethManning claude-education-skills), the Curator (Tech Digest, Newsletter Creation), the Strategist (Management Consulting, Decision Toolkit, MBB Management Consultant).

### The Builder Bundle (/bundles/the-builder)

The Builder Bundle is the avatar-specific layer for functional-output creators: solo SaaS founders, indie hackers, AI agent builders, plugin authors and hardware makers working with Claude Code in 2026. Three skills install on top of the Foundational Creator Bundle substrate. The Foundational Bundle is the assumed pre-install; the Builder Bundle does not duplicate its skills.

Skill 1: gstack (github.com/garrytan/gstack, MIT). Garry Tan's open-source software factory. Twenty-three specialists and eight power tools as Claude Code slash commands. The shipping ritual is three commands: /ship (clean PR with sync and tests), /land-and-deploy (merge, deploy, verify production) and /canary (post-deploy monitoring). Same install brings 30+ companion commands: /office-hours (product interrogation with six forcing questions), /plan-ceo-review (strategic challenge with four scope modes), /review (rigorous PR review), /qa (real browser testing on a staging URL), /cso (OWASP plus STRIDE security audit), /retro (weekly engineering retrospective) and the rest. Distributes as one repository with a setup script; not as a Claude Code marketplace plugin.

Skill 2: Context7 (github.com/upstash/context7, MIT). Live documentation injection MCP. Pulls version-specific, up-to-date documentation and code examples directly from source repositories into the AI coding session. Two-step pattern: resolve the library ID first, then query live docs. Removes the hallucination tax for fast-moving libraries (Supabase, Next.js, Tailwind, Stripe and others). Distributes as a Claude Code marketplace plugin (context7-plugin@context7-marketplace).

Skill 3: Impeccable (github.com/pbakaus/impeccable, Apache 2.0). Design fluency for code-first builders. One skill, twenty-three commands, curated anti-pattern detection. Everyday commands /impeccable polish and /impeccable audit. Phase-specific commands /impeccable harden (error handling, internationalization, edge cases) and /impeccable onboard (first-run flows, empty states, activation paths). Apache 2.0 permits commercial use without restriction. Distributes as a Claude Code marketplace plugin (impeccable@impeccable).

Install method: one-line `curl -sSL https://www.infinitegameos.io/bundles/the-builder/install.sh | bash`. Idempotent. Edits Claude Code settings.json in place to register two marketplaces (context7-marketplace, impeccable) and enable two plugins. Clones github.com/garrytan/gstack into the Claude Code skills directory and runs the gstack setup script. Restart Claude Code after install. Rollback path is restoring the timestamped backup the script writes plus removing the gstack clone.

Use cases: solo SaaS founder shipping the next feature (Researcher upstream, Plan Challenger pre-build, Context7 during code, Impeccable at polish, /ship + /land-and-deploy + /canary at the deploy phase); indie hacker running multiple products simultaneously (single user-level install applies to every project); AI agent builder working at the frontier (Context7 is load-bearing for unstable APIs and incomplete docs); plugin author extending an existing platform (full lifecycle from idea to deprecation across Obsidian, VS Code, Figma, Shopify and others).

Why this bundle exists for the Builder. Build speed has compressed dramatically in 2026; AI coding assistants compress build time, but distribution work is unchanged. The bundle protects shipping cadence so attention can move to the harder problem (the first ten paying users). Each launch is a finite game; the Infinite Game is the portfolio compounding across years. Aliveness is the engine the bundle protects by removing friction (research, debugging, polish, deploy) that would otherwise erode it under sustained output.

### The Writer Bundle (/bundles/the-writer)

The Writer Bundle is the avatar-specific layer for text-first creators: newsletter operators, essayists, ghostwriters, indie authors and threadwriters working with Claude Code in 2026. Two skills install on top of the Foundational Creator Bundle substrate plus a companion workspace template. The Foundational Bundle is the assumed pre-install; the Writer Bundle does not duplicate its skills. Voice is the entire value proposition for the Writer archetype; every resource in the bundle either protects voice, extends voice or frees up more time to use voice.

Skill 1: Voice Ghostwriter (github.com/BayramAnnakov/founder-voice-ghostwriter, MIT). Bayram Annakov's voice-calibration skill. Four-stage flow: calibrate against existing work (sentence-length distribution, punctuation placement, evidence patterns, rhythm), extract specifics through structured interview (the same move ghostwriters use on founders, applied to solo writers on themselves), draft in the calibrated voice and refine with targeted edits rather than full rewrites. Built originally for founders writing thought leadership; the four-stage flow maps cleanly to newsletter, essay and ghostwriting pipelines. The interview-extraction step is the protection against voice contamination across multiple ghostwriting clients. Distributes as a single-skill repository with SKILL.md at the root.

Skill 2: Humanizer (github.com/Aboudjem/humanizer-skill, MIT). 37-pattern AI-writing detector and rewriter across five categories. Five voice profiles (casual, professional, technical, warm, blunt) for different sub-archetypes. Detect-mode flag (--mode detect) audits a draft without changing anything; rewrite mode rebuilds sentence structure rather than swapping synonyms. Pure markdown skill, zero dependencies, installs by copying one file. The structural-rebuild approach distinguishes it from word-swap humanizers; the detect-mode flag is the audit gate ghostwriters and essayists use before delivery or publish.

Companion: Multi-Format Content Writer (github.com/WomenDefiningAI/claudecode-writer, MIT). Claude Code workspace template, not a portable skill. Distributes via the GitHub Use-this-template flow. Workspace contains /rawnotes, /context, /drafts, /research folders plus slash commands /extract-themes, /research, /write that operate against those folders. One source idea moves through long-form draft and platform-adaptation passes for LinkedIn, newsletter, Twitter thread and podcast Q&A. Lives outside the install script because the slash commands depend on the workspace folder structure; forcing it into a shared skills directory would break that contract.

Install method: one-line `curl -sSL https://www.infinitegameos.io/bundles/the-writer/install.sh | bash`. Idempotent. Clones github.com/BayramAnnakov/founder-voice-ghostwriter into ~/.claude/skills/voice-ghostwriter (single-skill repo, SKILL.md at root). Fetches the Humanizer SKILL.md from raw.githubusercontent.com/Aboudjem/humanizer-skill into ~/.claude/skills/humanizer/SKILL.md. Writes timestamped backups before overwriting. Does not touch settings.json. Restart Claude Code after install. Rollback path is removing the two skill directories. The companion template repo is not installed by the script; the install completion message links to the GitHub Use-this-template flow.

Use cases: newsletter operator publishing weekly (Voice Ghostwriter calibration against the back issues, Humanizer detect-mode on the draft, Multi-Format adaptation for LinkedIn and Twitter); ghostwriter managing multiple clients (per-client calibration prevents voice contamination across projects); essayist writing long-arc work (Plan Challenger on the outline, Voice Ghostwriter calibration against the archive, Humanizer rebuild of drift sections); indie author maintaining voice across 50,000 words (per-chapter calibration locks tonal consistency); threadwriter feeding a newsletter (Multi-Format template runs in reverse, thread becomes seed for the long-form version).

Why this bundle exists for the Writer. Voice consistency over thousands of pieces is the load-bearing problem. Voice drift is the most expensive failure mode for the archetype; readers feel the drift without diagnosing it and unsubscribe before the writer notices. Finite games ask how to get this piece done; the Infinite Game asks how to stay recognizably yourself across ten thousand pieces. The bundle is a finite-game tool aimed at the Infinite question. Aliveness is the engine the bundle protects by removing friction (research, voice-matching, AI-pattern detection, multi-format adaptation) that would otherwise erode the parts of writing that require presence.

---
